spec.description: This is a Grafana Dashboard to show scraped metrics from Vikunja using Prometheus.
go_memstats_lookups_total – counts how many pointer dereferences happened. This is a counter value so you can use rate() to lookups/s.
spec.title: Rate of a Pointer Dereferences

spec.description: shows how many heap objects are allocated. This is a counter value so you can use rate() to objects allocated/s.
spec.title: Rate of Objects Allocated
Vikunja
